overview: This U/B/G Legacy deck leverages Aluren to reduce permanent costs to {1}, enabling rapid deployment of Show and Tell. Lotus Petal provides the necessary mana acceleration to cast these spells early and consistently. The goal is to bypass traditional mana curves by fetching high-mana-value threats for minimal investment.
win_conditions: Deploying large creatures via Show and Tell for {1} after Aluren resolves
Overwhelming opponents with early mana advantage from Lotus Petal
Generating unblockable combat damage with fetched threats

keep_criteria: Hands containing Lotus Petal or Aluren
Hands with Show and Tell and at least two lands
Hands with early mana acceleration and draw
Keep hands with two or more sources of fast mana (Lotus Petal, Mox, Dark Ritual, etc.) paired with Aluren, Show and Tell, or a draw spell.
Keep 4+ lands if you have zero fast mana.
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking lands or mana sources
Hands with only high-cost permanents and no Aluren
Hands with no interaction or combo pieces
Mulligan hands with only lands, only non-mana non-combo cards, or a broken mana base that can't cast your key spells by turn two.

early_game: Prioritize playing Lotus Petal and Aluren to establish cost reduction and mana generation
Use Show and Tell for {1} to fetch a large threat as soon as possible
Protect key permanents from early disruption
Turn 1: Play a land, cast fast mana, and either cast Aluren or draw spells to dig for your combo.
Turn 2: Cast Show and Tell, fetch a massive creature like Griselbrand or Emrakul, and cast it for free via Aluren.
If Aluren isn't in play, use fast mana to cast Show and Tell and target a creature in your graveyard.
Land sequencing: Prioritize fetches and shocks to generate fast mana, then play basics to ensure you can cast Aluren and Show and Tell without flooding.
mid_game: Apply consistent pressure with fetched creatures
Use excess mana to cast additional spells or fetch more threats
Maintain board presence while searching for answers to opponent's threats
Hoard fast mana until you have the full combo package or a clear win condition.
Use card draw (Necropotence, Glimpse the Unthinkable, Brainstorm) to dig for pieces while managing your life total and graveyard.
If facing graveyard hate, avoid unnecessary graveyard interactions and pivot to direct combo wins or Leyline of the Void.
Commit threats only when you can win the game or have a backup plan to protect them.
Don't overextend into board wipes or sweepers unless you're confident you can win in response.
Use counterspells and discard to protect your combo pieces and disrupt opponent's key spells.
late_game: Leverage mana advantage to outvalue opponents
Use Show and Tell repeatedly to fetch game-ending permanents
Stabilize against control decks by reducing removal costs to {1}

Griselbrand (life gain and massive card draw), Emrakul, the Aeons Torn (draw seven and exile permanents), Karn, the Great Creator (Engineered Plague or Leyline of the Void), and Bogardan Hellkite (board sweep and direct damage).
Get there by resolving Show and Tell or casting Aluren creatures, then following up with the finisher.
Go all-in when you have the full combo package (fast mana + Aluren/Show and Tell + target) or when you can win in a single turn.
Commit to the board if you have a clear path to victory and your opponent has no immediate answers.

key_cards.name: Aluren
key_cards.notes: Sets all permanent mana costs to {1}, enabling early Show and Tell and cheap removal or interaction.

key_cards.name: Lotus Petal
key_cards.notes: Provides early mana to cast Show and Tell or pay for Aluren's synergy, often played before Aluren to generate resources.

key_cards.name: Show and Tell
key_cards.notes: Fetches permanents with mana value 7 or greater; cast for {1} after Aluren resolves to bypass traditional mana curves.

sequencing_tips: Play Lotus Petal before Aluren to generate mana for Show and Tell
Cast Aluren before Show and Tell to reduce its cost to {1}
Use Show and Tell to fetch threats with mana value 7 or greater
Prioritize fetching creatures that can immediately impact the board
Common mistakes include mulliganing too aggressively, overcommitting to the board without a win condition, and ignoring graveyard hate.
Aluren bypasses casting costs but not targeting or counterspells, so plan accordingly.
Karn can find Engineered Plague or Leyline of the Void, providing a secondary win condition.
Always have a backup plan if your primary combo is disrupted.

matchups.advice: Use Aluren to reduce blocker or removal costs to {1}, and fetch large creatures to stabilize quickly.
Protect combo pieces with counterspells or evasion, and use Show and Tell to fetch threats that pressure life totals.
Disrupt their key pieces early, and race them by deploying large threats via Show and Tell as fast as possible.

Use discard to remove counterspells before they can be cast. Cast your combo pieces in response to counterspells, or rely on Aluren's free casting to bypass targeting if they only counter spells. Have multiple targets for Show and Tell to make it difficult to counter everything.

Use discard to hit their mana rocks and slow their acceleration. Bring in artifact hate to remove their fast mana. Play around their big spells by holding up counterspells or discard, and aim to win before they can stabilize.

Win the resource war by using discard to hit their combo pieces and card draw to out-draw them. Prioritize graveyard hate if they rely on it, and aim to resolve your combo before they can. Control the board with counterspells and discard to protect your game plan.

common_threats: Watch for discard spells to see what they're targeting, and note when opponents tap out for counterspells versus when they're holding up.
Pay attention to graveyard interactions—if they're casting Leyline or Rest in Peace, your combo game plan is severely compromised.
Track their mana development to anticipate when they can answer your threats.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Aluren reduces costs to {1}, Lotus Petal accelerates mana, Show and Tell fetches MV 7+ permanents.

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Signature card synergy enables early big threats.

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Aluren reduces costs to {1}, Lotus Petal accelerates mana, Show and Tell fetches MV 7+ permanents.

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Standard Legacy interaction and removal spells.
